content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Special Numbers". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1594/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains an integer n. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the count of special numbers.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Check each number to see if it is special by verifying if it is equal to the sum of its digits raised to the power of the number of digits.

code.Python3:
import math
for _ in range(int(input())):
    n = int(input())
    arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
    count = 0
    for num in arr:
        sum = 0
        temp = num
        digitCount = 0
        while temp != 0:
            digitCount += 1
            temp //= 10
        temp = num
        while temp != 0:
            digit = temp % 10
            sum += int(math.pow(digit, digitCount))
            temp //= 10
        if sum == num:
            count += 1
    print(count)
